title: salmia trigona
intro: Salmia trigona, also known as the African bird's eye or African bird's eye chili, is a perennial plant native to tropical Africa. This plant contains capsaicin, which is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salmia trigona include reducing pain and inflammation, aiding in digestion, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Salmia trigona include making a paste from the leaves and seeds, which can be applied topically or used in cooking and traditional medicine.
